metaTitle: New Construction South Tampa FL - Expert Contractors | Titan Homes Group
metaDescription: Top-rated new construction in South Tampa, FL. Licensed general contractor with 10+ years and 350+ completed projects. Free consultations — call (813) 608-4564 | Titan Homes Group.
h1: New Construction Services in South Tampa, FL
intro: Build your dream home from the ground up in South Tampa, FL with Titan Homes Group. Complete design-build services from a fully licensed Florida General Contractor — FL #CBC1264713.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group offers full design-build services for new residential construction in South Tampa, FL. As a fully licensed Florida General Contractor (License #CBC1264713), we guide South Tampa homeowners through every phase of building a custom home — from land assessment and architectural design through construction, inspections, and final walkthrough.

Building a custom home in South Tampa is one of life's most significant decisions. Our design-build model gives you a single point of contact and full accountability from first sketch to move-in day. Our in-house design team creates detailed floor plans and 3D renderings so you can visualize your South Tampa dream home before construction begins.

Throughout the build, we coordinate all trades and subcontractors, maintain rigorous quality control, and provide transparent progress reporting. Our new construction team in South Tampa uses premium materials, energy-efficient building practices, and proven construction methods to deliver homes that are built to last and designed to perform in Florida's climate.

Titan Homes Group's reputation in South Tampa and throughout Tampa Bay is built on quality craftsmanship, honest communication, and a genuine commitment to bringing each client's vision to life.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom home in South Tampa, FL?
faqs.answer: Custom home construction in South Tampa typically takes 8–18 months depending on design complexity, size, and permitting timeline. We provide a detailed construction schedule during the design phase so you can plan accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you offer design services for new construction in South Tampa?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our design-build model includes full architectural coordination, floor plan design, material selections, and 3D renderings. We handle design and construction as a unified team, saving you time and ensuring cohesive results.

faqs.question: What is your new construction warranty in South Tampa?
faqs.answer: Titan Homes Group provides a workmanship warranty on all new construction in South Tampa. We are also fully licensed, bonded, and insured, giving you comprehensive protection throughout the build process.
